description: Visit window overlap — a subject's visit records fall into two different analysis visit windows (e.g., Week 4 and Week 8). Agent should detect and flag the overlap rather than double-counting.

sap_context.tfl: Baseline demographics table by visit (TC-002 variant)
sap_context.note: Subject XYZ-001-007 has Week 6 assessment that falls into both the Week 4 (days 22-42) and Week 8 (days 43-63) analysis windows

expected_output.expected_behavior: Should detect overlapping visit windows and either flag or apply window assignment rule
